item.title: Regeneron Eylea Sales Decline
item.description:
• Summary: Regeneron's Eylea (aflibercept) quarterly sales dropped below $1 billion for the first time in eight years, reflecting increased competition from biosimilars and newer agents. The decline marks a shift in the wet AMD and DME market dynamics.
  • MoAs: Eylea (aflibercept): Vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF) inhibitor (binds VEGF-A, VEGF-B, and PlGF)
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
